name: December 2025 Dinner
description: Year-end gathering covering AI consulting models, economic impact of AI, expert systems vs LLMs, medical transcription, deep research, and the ARC-AGI challenge.

topics.text: AI consulting — offer cloud or local deployment flexibility, apply 80/20 rule; projects getting bigger in 2026
Economic impact of AI — inequality increasing, philosophical discussion on capitalism and automation
Rise of robotics — clear benefits for elderly care and healthcare
Expert systems still beat LLMs in certain domains — chess expert system at 3,500 Elo vs LLMs at 800
Challenges of AI-generated code — duplication, need for strong foundations, MCP and Figma for UI/UX
Medical transcription augmented by AI — identifying terminology misquotes and structural issues
Deep research applications — parallel agents searching, synthesising, and presenting information; ESG signals for hedge funds
Ian's Playgroup deep-dive events and ARC-AGI 2026 challenge — can LLMs solve spatial reasoning?
